note: Manual merge overrides for citation_index.py. Applied after the deterministic post-hoc merge pass. Add new groups here when fuzzy candidates are confirmed as the same paper/dataset. canonical_key must be present in the built entries; missing merge_keys are silently skipped.

groups.note: SpeechTokenizer (Xin Zhang et al., ICLR 2024, arXiv:2308.16692). The word 'large' is omitted from the title in some citations, producing a split title: entry that the normalized-title merge cannot join to the arxiv: entry (which has no title from structured refs).
CSTR VCTK Corpus (Yamagishi, Veaux, MacDonald). Multiple version strings (v0.92, 2017, Superseded) and DOIs treated as the same dataset per user decision. canonical is the Edinburgh DataShare DOI.
